documents.title: Diabetes
documents.content: Diabetes is a chronic pre-existing disease with typical waiting period of 24 months. Hospitalization and complications are covered, OPD excluded.

documents.title: Heart Disease
documents.content: Heart disease has waiting period of around 36 months. Procedures like angioplasty, bypass surgery and ICU care are covered.

documents.title: Hypertension
documents.content: Hypertension has waiting period of 24 months. Stroke and cardiac complications are covered after waiting period.
